/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libsemba-types.a "CMakeFiles/semba-types.dir/src_main_pub/nfde_types.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-types.dir/src_main_pub/fdetypes.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-types.dir/src_mtln/mtln_types.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-types.dir/src_conformal/conformal_types.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-types.dir/src_wires_pub/wires_types.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-types.dir/src_main_pub/lumped_types.F90.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libsemba-types.a
